# CGPSConverter

**Class**

An opaque data type used to convert PostScript data to PDF data.

## Declaration

```swift
class CGPSConverter
```

## Overview

The PostScript data is supplied by a data provider and written into a data consumer. When you create a PostScript converter object, you can supply callback functions to invoke at various stages of the conversion process.

## Initializers

- **init(info:callbacks:options:)**: Creates a new PostScript converter.

## Instance Properties

- **isConverting**: Checks whether the converter is currently converting data.

## Type Properties

- **typeID**: Returns the Core Foundation type identifier for PostScript converters.

## Instance Methods

- **abort()**: Tells a PostScript converter to abort a conversion at the next available opportunity.
- **convert(_:consumer:options:)**: Uses a PostScript converter to convert PostScript data to PDF data.

## Related Documentation

- **Quartz 2D Programming Guide**

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
